reviews.review_description: Had a great journey in the game but need more upgradable , airplane and npc

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review. We are working on new features. We will roll out new updates soon.

reviews.review_description: But a lot of potential let's see

Cabin Crew VR Flight Attendant Simulator kicks off with a fun rush—you’re late for your shift and have to sprint through customs, grab your extinguisher and medical kit, and get ready to greet passengers with a smile and a safety brief. Once on board, it’s all systems go: distributing menus, serving meals, collecting trays, and handling surprises mid-flight.

It’s a clever and fast-paced experience that makes great use of VR. The game is still in Early Access, which means there’s lots of room for additional storylines, new scenarios, and maybe even a full journey to becoming a top-tier flight attendant.

Fun, original, and perfectly suited for VR—Cabin Crew VR is a creative and enjoyable simulation that lets you travel the world from your headset. ✈️🌍

reviews.review_title: good game but needs worked. Detail below
reviews.review_description: I love this game but the issue I have is where I was collecting plates to put on the table after the passengers were done, the plate is not recognized and the timer to collect the plates still running.. I was doing good on the way I did and still get negative score. I feel the plate collection is throwing the whole thing off. This happens every time. Also, Please add captioning. I had to play this game with live captioning and sometimes its incorrect.
